---
name: Bug report
about: Report a deployment or template behavior issue
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem in 1-2 sentences.

## Environment

- Railway workspace:
- Template URL:
- Deployment URL:
- First deploy or update:

## What you expected

Describe expected behavior.

## What happened

Describe actual behavior and error text.

## Logs and evidence

Paste sanitized logs and screenshots.

## Validation step that failed

Reference the failed section in `validation-runbook.md`.

## Checklist

- [ ] I removed secrets from logs
- [ ] I included deployment/template URLs
- [ ] I included reproducible steps
